Friend,
On May 1st, I announced my candidacy for the U.S. Senate against Tom Cotton. For the last several weeks, my staff and I have been working hard to build out the type of campaign that is going to be necessary to win statewide in 2020.
Now comes the hard part.
One of our first considerations is our campaign budget. Everything from television ads to pens and paper clips need to be accounted for as we move forward to ensure we are making the most of our resources.
As I work on the budget, it would be a great help if you could support the campaign by taking care of one of the many items we need to run a successful and strong race.
[Can I count on you to cover one of the following, either with a one-time contribution or once a month with a recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7260564/68152658/-347867019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JmNjdlZi1jYzg2LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vxlFtYEY6-16HF-Qznp3qfPRP-uIE4P3TQFgc7njxGQ=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Joan=20Perry=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Help Us Continue Our Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
Help Us Continue Our Fight | | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=47e20aac85&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | Last week as I reflected on the importance of Memorial Day, I was moved by President Ronald Reagan’s speech at Arlington National Cemetery on May 31,1982. “The United States and the freedom for which it stands, the freedom for which they died, must endure and prosper. Their lives remind us that freedom is not bought cheaply. It has a cost; it imposes a burden. **And just as they whom we commemorate were willing to sacrifice, so too must we - in a less final, less heroic way - be willing to give of ourselves.** ” As I travel throughout District 3, I’m honored to meet veterans, active military, and military spouses who are so generously giving of themselves to preserve our freedom. I want to assure you, as your representative in Congress, you can count on me to be a staunch supporter of our nation’s military.
From providing the best healthcare options for our veterans, to treating the long term impact of PTSD, and prioritizing funding for all of our military bases here in North Carolina, you should know, **I’m 100% committed to supporting our military.** As local high school and college students graduated during these last few weeks, I was reminded of how much our country has changed since my high school graduation. If you’re like me, you’re thankful to God for our great country and the opportunities you’ve been given. As you reflect on your past, you recognize there is a force in this country and in Congress that opposes our values and is working hard in support of socialism. It’s urgent that we continue to work together to preserve the lives of the unborn and to create a bright future for our children and grandchildren. There is much at stake in this battle. Summer vacation is here, so it can be easy to lapse into a different frame of mind, set politics aside, and forget the seriousness of this election. **However, the values we hold dear are being challenged, so[now more than ever we need your support](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=564971ceb2&e=0bf1d0f47f).** I believe you’ll appreciate the significance of this quote from Ronald Reagan on October 27, 1964 (long before he became President), “**You and I have a rendezvous with destiny. We will preserve for our children this, the last best hope of man on earth, or we will sentence them to take the first step into a thousand years of darkness.** If we fail, at least let our children and our children’s children say of us we justified our brief moment here. We did all that could be done.”
Please consider joining Team Perry. **We need your help to continue this fight.**

Joan Perry

subject: We are in a climate emergency. Today, I'm announcing my plan for a Clean Energy Revolution and Environmental Justice. Please sign your name to join us.

body:
I'm announcing my plan for a Clean Energy Revolution and Environmental Justice. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931942d/1cd0ac28/25eb921d/356c9946/4121733171/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter --

Nothing gives me more hope for the future than seeing my five grandchildren challenge expectations. They'll see breakthroughs in technology we can't even yet imagine.

**But the only way they 're going to get the chance to fulfill all that potential is if we take drastic action right now to address the climate disaster facing the nation and our world.**

[So today, I'm announcing my plan for a Clean Energy Revolution and Environmental Justice.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931942d/1cd0ac28/25eb921d/356c9945/4121733171/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Clean-Energy-Revolution?source=email-bsd-20190604climate-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190604climate&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Science tells us that how we act, or fail to act, in the next 12 years will determine the very livability of our planet.

Yet, today, President Trump denies the evidence in front of his own eyes, hides climate science produced by his own Administration, and actively works to roll back what progress we have already made.

It's reckless, It's irresponsible. And it's unacceptable.

[If you agree that we must tackle the climate emergency, click here to hear more about my plan and become a citizen co-sponsor for a Clean Energy Revolution and Environmental Justice.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931942d/1cd0ac28/25eb921d/356c9945/4121733171/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Clean-Energy-Revolution?source=email-bsd-20190604climate-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190604climate&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

It outlines what we have to do to meet this challenge head on -- and how we're going to get there:
* We're going to invest $1.7 trillion in securing our future so that, by 2050, the United States will be a **100% clean-energy economy with net-zero emissions**.

* We're going to make **record-breaking investments** in research and development and zero-carbon technologies so that America is the engine of the world's clean energy economy.

* This initiative will create more than **10 million new, good-paying jobs** all across the clean economy in the United States of America. It's an enormous opportunity.

* **We 'll hold polluters accountable** for the damage they've caused -- particularly in low-income communities and communities of color.

* **We 're not going to forget the workers either.** The workers who, through dangerous and back-breaking labor, fueled America's prosperity throughout the 20th century. They've earned our thanks, our respect, and our support.

* Finally, we have to bring the world along with us. On day one, I will immediately rejoin the Paris Climate Accord -- but that's not sufficient. I'll immediately get to work leading a diplomatic initiative to **get every nation to go beyond their initial commitment** \-- to push our progress further, and faster.

America once again will be able to stand proudly on the world stage and challenge every other nation to follow our example and our leadership.

I'll use every authority available to me to drive progress -- and I will not accept half-measures -- because making these revolutionary changes is going to take an incredible commitment at all levels.

But I am absolutely confident that we can meet this challenge -- because this is what America does best: solve big problems with big ideas.

We are the United States of America. There is not a single thing we can't do. And the world badly needs us to do it.

[If you agree that America has what it takes to solve big problems with big ideas, please sign on as a citizen co-sponsor today.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931942d/1cd0ac28/25eb921d/356c9945/4121733171/VEsC/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Clean-Energy-Revolution?source=email-bsd-20190604climate-b1_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190604climate&utm_content=b1_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Thank you,

_Joe_
|

body:
Friends,

Texas families will face a $27 billion dollar annual tax increase if President Donald Trump's plan to slap a 25% tariff on all imports from Mexico comes to pass.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xY7nuQOup45-p1sbM54Dq0kKV8BF3t5i5nLCL5lKaKU=/yWJVvF9p1Dp8TDGR2XD8tpYZ3v9VRY0kAGp6iBnS_kY=)

[My friend, I wholeheartedly denounce the Trump Administration's irresponsible and short-sighted plan to levy tariffs on imported goods from Mexico at the expense of families like yours and mine. We need to fix what's not working, not play politics with the livelihood of Texas families. If you agree, add your name now >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/xY7nuQOup45-p1sbM54Dq0kKV8BF3t5i5nLCL5lKaKU=/jwiMVH522pSCHFz2dPrddcTPVcQypvsvg6Me21gmlHw=)

As someone who served our country overseas for 14 years, I know the importance of trade to our Texas economy, and the American economy as a whole. I've witnessed firsthand the damage that can be done to economies when governments meddle with free markets to score political points. Every Texan, and every American, deserves independent leaders in Congress who put them and their families first.

[It's time to put country above party, my friend. Stand with me now in putting families above divisive, partisan politics.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xY7nuQOup45-p1sbM54Dq0kKV8BF3t5i5nLCL5lKaKU=/jwiMVH522pSCHFz2dPrddcTPVcQypvsvg6Me21gmlHw=)

Putting our country first means speaking out for what's right, not staying silent. Last Friday, I demanded Pete Olson condemn Trump's harmful plan. And you can trust me to continue standing up for what's right and speaking out against what's destructive for Texas and America.

"If not us, who? If not now, when?"
\- John F. Kennedy

In solidarity,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xY7nuQOup45-p1sbM54Dq0kKV8BF3t5i5nLCL5lKaKU=/440Be2YatnDUQEdGRR1zE2hHmkDbIambGnIJPowhoFM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xY7nuQOup45-p1sbM54Dq0kKV8BF3t5i5nLCL5lKaKU=/HIPSG1MuCD3e46jM6vPrn1rU6cYSTlLABrqCJFy03hs=)

name: Zach Graumann, Yang2020
subject: Roadmap to Miami
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=1)[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=2) I've promised since we started that we'd run the most efficient and most transparent campaign in the 2020 election, and so I'm writing you today to reveal our roadmap to the debates at the end of the month. Andrew's message is taking off, and we have a lot of major press hits, events, and exciting developments ahead of our trip to Miami. [**Andrew's excited by all of these opportunities, and he's grateful for your support. Help us make the most of them by donating $20 to the campaign today!**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOeLHcr_ZoyjmBbfdAE_htA3NMKjWKgbEQ19_kNpni9T_zZKIHjJ_7ivr3WfGwkVdZZ45JXIopV9-w1G7xt07DNITpMOXgzk56hrO_JqoXIjVcS04KOL9S6Fdm7vSHI4hfHAW3mgZe6fw1DPZCRAecTA&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=3 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") Here's our schedule for the upcoming month (subject to change):
* 6/4 - Buzzfeed Morning News interview, aired this morning at 10am
* 6/7 - Filming The Rubin Report - we'll let you know when it goes live
* 6/7 - Real Time with Bill Maher, airs live on HBO at 10pm EST
* 6/11 - Pod Save America - we'll let you know when it's posted
* 6/11 - The Young Turks - we'll post a link when it's available
* 6/16 - CloseUp on WMUR, one of the biggest political shows in New Hampshire
* 6/17 - Event with the Poor People's Campaign, a continuation of the work of Dr. Martin Luther King advocating for a guaranteed minimum income
* 6/18 - Meet the Press Daily, airing live at 5pm
* 6/21-22 - A swing through South Carolina to speak at Congressman Jim Clyburn's Fish Fry and the State Democratic Convention
* 6/26 or 27 - DNC Debates in Miami

And that's just what's booked right now! We've got a few other big-name shows happening this month, too. We'll let you know when we're allowed to talk about them :-) In between these events, Andrew's spending most of his time preparing for the debates. He's meeting with experts, working on his answers, and practicing with our team to master his delivery. We are going to sound so different up on that stage - I have full confidence that he is going to knock this thing out of the park. The DNC is releasing the schedule and line-up around the 15th - you'll know which night Andrew is going to be on as soon as we can release that info. Finally, some updates on the campaign. We've been hiring new team members and optimizing our operations. Our teams in New Hampshire and Iowa have expanded, and we're going to announce hires in other early primary states soon. After the success of our Humanity First tour, the Advance/Volunteer team is bringing on more members to manage the rapidly growing Yang Gang and make our future events bigger and better. And the Finance Team is building out our national network of grassroots fundraisers. On that note, our fundraising is showing growth - we're on track to have a record-breaking week. However, we're not quite there yet, and we still need to accelerate our fundraising growth to hit our target of $3.5m by the end of Q2. We're at $1.5m, so we need $2m during the month of June. [**Can you donate $20 today to help us hit our $3.5m target for Q2?**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOeLHcr_ZoyjmBbfdAE_htA3NMKjWKgbEQ19_kNpni9T_zZKIHjJ_7ivr3WfGwkVdZZ45JXIopV9-w1G7xt07DNITpMOXgzk56hrO_JqoXIjVcS04KOL9S6Fdm7vSHI4hfNwgfrX4yfKrqoPQZ_FIMjQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=4 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") All signs point to our campaign taking off, and this is before Andrew hits the debate stage and introduces himself to millions of more Americans. 24 million people watched the first RNC debate for the 2016 cycle, and Democrats are even more animated for this election. We are excited to introduce Andrew to the world. [**Chip in today and help us own our moment.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOeLHcr_ZoyjmBbfdAE_htA3NMKjWKgbEQ19_kNpni9T_zZKIHjJ_7ivr3WfGwkVdZZ45JXIopV9-w1G7xt07DNITpMOXgzk56hrO_JqoXIjVcS04KOL9S6Fdm7vSHI4hfoFlKKllZGc_xSqfQBXV79g&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=5 "ActBlue
Page for Andrew Yang") Zach Graumann Campaign Manager, Yang2020
---

[ DONATE $10](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jXS7z6B0vQBSFYMqiqGORLM&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=6)

[ DONATE $20](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jdWXtiYd7YoTmFcK-0i3r20&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=7)

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=8)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=9) and someone from our team will reach out.

|
---
Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality.

[Yang2020.com](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=c5dAo5qulKAncvNYjq2uGSZwl_jDGybFpG2O3zBACL4&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=10) | [Twitter](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqE6xdNTSVfW5RhtXxhMjJ0&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=11) | [Facebook](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iem_nK8ycftXP-O5PmREpZFFJK2fNzInyXSvMk1KZmg&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=12) | [Instagram](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y48vYg4fs9ZaLi2ukqvLwvJQL5wg0UiTTe5otEcf4_Y3&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=06042019_zupdate_2&n=13)

Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang.

All rights reserved.
New York, NY
#HumanityFirst

subject: President Trump, Queen Elizabeth Toast to Historic US-UK Relationship at State Banquet
body:
In a toast to the Queen, the President described Her Majesty as a “constant symbol” of our shared values and spoke about the upcoming... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fda4240b6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump, Queen Elizabeth Toast to Historic US-UK Relationship at State Banquet**

“President Trump attended a state banquet on Monday hosted by Queen Elizabeth II, where the two leaders hailed the historic importance of their countries' relationship,” Brett Samuels reports in _The Hill_.

In a toast to the Queen, the President described Her Majesty as a “constant symbol” of our shared values and spoke about the upcoming 75th anniversary of the D-Day invasion this Thursday. Queen Elizabeth said that “tonight, we celebrate an alliance that has helped to ensure the safety and prosperity of both our peoples for decades, and which I believe will endure for many years to come.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d535ffeab1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Yesterday, the President and First Lady were presented special gifts by Queen Elizabeth II during their visit to Buckingham Palace, Natalie Musumeci reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0774fcf1a3&e=3ee4985eea). President Trump received “an abridged first edition of Winston Churchill’s book on World War II.” The First Lady was given “a ‘specially commissioned silver box’ with a ‘handcrafted enamel lid’ that was designed to match the ceiling of Buckingham Palace’s music room.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump has given the Duke of Edinburgh a personalised Air Force One jacket as a special gift in honour of the UK state visit. The famous jackets are traditionally worn by US presidents when travelling by air,” Olivia Petter writes in [_The Independent_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b3c040737&e=3ee4985eea). “It’s an apt gift for Prince Philip, who became a pilot for the Royal Air Force in 1952.”
---
|
---
| “The Border Patrol is seeing an increase in migrants from African countries who are blending in with the large numbers crossing the southern border illegally through Central America,” Fred Lucas reports in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e5dd007c3&e=3ee4985eea). Agents at the Del Rio, Texas sector “apprehended 116 individuals last week from African countries as they crossed the border from Mexico.”
---
|
---
| Yesterday, Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL) “announced that full funding has been secured to complete the project to elevate the Tamiami Trail. The U.S. Department of Transportation has matched the state of Florida’s $40 million for the Tamiami Trail by awarding an additional $60 million,” the [_Keys Weekly_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fe161b3f5&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “I thank President Trump and his administration, including Secretary Elaine Chao, for yet again proving their dedication to the people of Florida as we work to restore our water quality and protect our environment,” Gov. DeSantis said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16d92d5ea9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c2fedb787&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e317d090fd)

The famous jackets are traditionally worn by US presidents when travelling by air,” Olivia Petter writes in . “It’s an apt gift for Prince Philip, who became a pilot for the Royal Air Force in 1952.” | | “The Border Patrol is seeing an increase in migrants from African countries who are blending in with the large numbers crossing the southern border illegally through Central America,” Fred Lucas reports in . Agents at the Del Rio, Texas sector “apprehended 116 individuals last week from African countries as they crossed the border from Mexico.” | | Yesterday, Gov. Ron DeSantis (R-FL) “announced that full funding has been secured to complete the project to elevate the Tamiami Trail. The U.S. Department of Transportation has matched the state of Florida’s $40 million for the Tamiami Trail by awarding an additional $60 million,” the reports. “I thank President Trump and his administration, including Secretary Elaine Chao, for yet again proving their dedication to the people of Florida as we work to restore our water quality and protect our environment,” Gov. DeSantis said. | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Andrew Thomas
subject: Homrich for Congress
body:
Hi Peter Willis,

This is Andrew Thomas with Lynne Homrich's campaign for Congress. I saw
that you have reached out to our team and I wanted to follow up with you to
give you more information about the campaign, to hear more about your
background, and to discuss ways that we could use your help!

As you know, Lynne is running in the 7th district which will be a
competitive race. We are looking to build a strong army of volunteers and
interns to support her campaign.

Please let me know if there is a good time for us to connect over the phone
to talk more about opportunities to get involved.

Thank you,

Andrew M. Thomas

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I need your thoughts (June survey)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
In just a few short weeks, I’ll take the stage for the first debate of this Democratic primary. This will be a huge opportunity for our campaign: millions of voters will tune in for the first time to hear how our campaign plans to meet the difficult challenges we face as a country, and what sets us apart. In November of 2020, we’re going to want a candidate on that stage who can prosecute the case against the destructive policies of President Trump. I can make that case. Our work starts right now, with this first debate. Before I take the debate stage, I want to make sure you have had a chance to share your input with my team and me. Ours is a campaign of the people, by the people, and for the people -- meaning you make our campaign possible. That’s why your feedback matters so much. **[We’re just weeks from the first debate of this crowded presidential primary election, and I want to hear from you. Can you take a few moments to complete our June Survey and share your thoughts with me?](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190604-june-survey?refcode=ema190604-full&source=ema190604-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=5227%2E5755789%2EL2giSO)** | | [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190604-june-survey?refcode=ema190604-full&source=ema190604-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5227%2E5755789%2EL2giSO)
---
What matters most to me in this campaign is this: whether the issues we’re campaigning on and the policies we’re proposing are relevant to the lives of real people. There are plenty of candidates in this race who can give a really lovely speech -- but I’m running for president to deliver real solutions to the real issues that impact real people.
That’s why it’s important to me that when I’m on that debate stage in a few weeks, I know what’s on your mind -- including what you think about the major issues facing our country, and what information you’re looking to learn from candidates in this debate.
I’m proud of the campaign we’re building together. We’re not taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests. Instead, we’re building our campaign from the ground up.
We’re powered by regular folks pitching in a few dollars at a time. By people taking action in their communities across our country to build our organization on the ground.
This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about all of us, and what we’re going to do together to move our country forward. That’s why I value your input so much.
**[Click here to take our campaign’s June survey. In a few days, we’ll compile the results and use your input to guide our strategy.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190604-june-survey?refcode=ema190604-full&source=ema190604-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5227%2E5755789%2EL2giSO)**
Thanks for being a part of our team.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list.
You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=5227%2E5755789%2EL2giSO), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5227%2E5755789%2EL2giSO)

name: Hal Ginsberg, Our Revolution
subject: Join us and stand up to corporate Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Are you for Medicare for All or are you on the side of the pharmaceutical corporations and insurance industry?
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a495/bed43eb/9429c792/75faaf34/2524263064/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a495/bed43eb/9429c792/75faaf37/2524263064/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/become-a-medicare-for-all-citizen-co-sponsor-md?source=em190604-md-snd?source=em190604-md-b")
Friends,
Last week, we launched the _Medicare for All Ambulance Tour_. We posed a simple question to corporate Democrats across the country: Are you for Medicare for All or are you on the side of the pharmaceutical corporations and insurance industry?
Our _Medicare for All Ambulance Tour_ made its first stop in Maryland in the districts of Majority Leader Steny Hoyer, David Trone, and Dutch Ruppersberger. We stood side by side with Our Revolution members in the field and called on these House Democrats to support Representative Pramila Jayapal's single-payer legislation.
Leader Hoyer has stonewalled multiple attempts to pass Medicare for All. He has repeatedly promised to fight for affordable, quality health care, but he has stood with corporate CEOs time after time.
[**We need your help to send a message to Leader Hoyer and to break the hold of the private insurance and Big Pharma lobby over the House Democratic Caucus. Will you add your name to our national petition and call on your Maryland representatives to back Rep. Jayapal 's Medicare for All legislation?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a495/bed43eb/9429c792/75faaf36/2524263064/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/become-a-medicare-for-all-citizen-co-sponsor-md?source=em190604-md-snd")
We are sending a message to House Democrats everywhere: Medicare for All is a progressive litmus test--either you're on the side of the sick and the suffering or you're with corporate health care CEOs. After our stop in Maryland, we joined dozens of Our Revolution protestors at Rep. Andy Kim's health care town hall in New Jersey. We demanded that Andy Kim turn his words into actions and help us resolve our country's health care crisis by passing Medicare for All legislation.
Our next stop is Illinois. We need your help to keep this tour going and continue to fight for Medicare for All.
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a495/bed43eb/9429c792/75faaf36/2524263064/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/become-a-medicare-for-all-citizen-co-sponsor-md?source=em190604-md-snd")**
Together, we are going to keep the pressure on corporate Democrats and continue the Medicare for All revolution.
In Solidarity,
Hal Ginsberg
Our Revolution

name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
We cannot stay silent while the future of our democracy is at stake. I called on Congress to open impeachment proceedings against President Trump.
|
---

| | Last Thursday, after watching Special Counsel Robert Mueller's latest public statement, I called on Congress to open impeachment proceedings against President Trump.

[**Will you sign my petition and demand Congress take action on impeachment proceedings immediately? We cannot stay silent while the future of our democracy is at stake. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82626/232dfd1/947947f/62a17fdb/2498043962/VEsH/ "http://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/impeachment-survey?source=20190604_em_pet_b1_baer_all")

Here's my official statement on impeachment proceedings:

_Special Counsel Robert Mueller's public statement yesterday underscores the difficult moment we find ourselves in as a country.

It is clear that there exist ample factual grounds to begin impeachment proceedings against the President of the United States. Mueller's statements, and his report, make clear that further investigation and any warranted prosecution of the President is the responsibility of Congress. Under Article I of the U.S. Constitution, Congress has the power and the responsibility to carry forward this work on behalf of the American people.

It is imperative that we maintain a commitment to the rule of law. And when the facts are so plainly in front of us, to turn away from them is untenable.

The way that we will move past Trumpism is through a democratic rejection of it by the American people at the ballot box. We started this process in 2018. We can and must continue it in 2020. Impeachment proceedings alone will not solve our national crisis. Only working together to deliver progress for all Americans will do that._

This is not something I take lightly.

After working in the State Department under President Obama and going toe-to-toe with Vladimir Putin's foreign ministry, I've seen my fair share of corrupt governments around the world -- and what is happening within our own government is deeply concerning.

I get that the _politics_ of impeachment are unclear.

What is clear is that we have a host of problems to confront, and we have to deliver solutions for the American people. To ignore the multiple apparent acts of wrongdoing by the President is to freelance where the Constitution gives us a clear instruction. What message does it send to kids if there is no accountability?

Principles must guide us, not politics.

**There are grounds to open impeachment proceedings, and Congress should take action now.**

At this critical moment in our history, will you make your voice heard? Please sign my petition and demand Congress immediately take action to open impeachment proceedings against President Trump. | | [**SIGN THE PETITION >> **](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82626/232dfd1/947947f/62a17fd8/2498043962/VEsE/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/impeachment-survey?source=20190604_em_pet_b1_baer_all")
---

Thank you,

Dan

|
---

subject: Video: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump in the U.K.
body:
Courtesy of Queen Elizabeth II, the first day of President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump’s first official State Visit... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9253a11918&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 4, 2019
---
| | |
# **Video of the Day: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump in the U.K.**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e684c81f37&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Thanks to the eminent hospitality** of Queen Elizabeth II**,** the first day of President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump’s official State Visit to the United Kingdom embodied the full elegance of a royal celebration.

**Yesterday’s full schedule** concluded where it began: historic Buckingham Palace, where President Trump and the Queen raised their glasses to the lasting friendship between our two nations.

**“Your Majesty,** Melania and I are profoundly honored to be your guests for this historic State Visit,” the President said. “On behalf of all Americans, I offer a toast to the eternal friendship of our people, the vitality of our nations, and to the long-cherished and truly remarkable reign of her Majesty, the Queen.”

[In photos: Day 1 of President Trump and the First Lady’s State Visit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d027d88876&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Why the U.S.–U.K. alliance is stronger than ever**

**Early this morning** by U.S. time, President Trump and British Prime Minister Theresa May marked day two of the President's State Visit to the U.K. with a joint press conference at 10 Downing Street in London.

**🎬****President Trump:** [“Melania and I are honored to return to London” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3bef3bf17a&e=3ee4985eea)

**As President Trump** stated it, the longstanding American-British alliance is the greatest the world has ever known. “Our relationship is grounded in common history, values, customs, culture, language and laws,” he said today. “Our people believe in freedom and independence as a sacred birthright and cherished inheritance worth defending at any cost.”

**On the world stage,** the United Kingdom remains a key partner in advancing shared global interests. Just one example of that alliance in action: the joint campaign to defeat ISIS. With the U.K.’s help, ISIS’ territorial caliphate in Syria and Iraq has now been completely obliterated.

**This week** also marks the 75th anniversary of D-Day. On June 6, 1944, American and British soldiers fought side-by-side to liberate Europe from brutal Nazi occupation and make the world safe for freedom and democracy. It was this shared sacrifice that sealed profound, enduring bonds between America and Britain.

**“Seventy-five years ago** this Thursday, courageous Americans and British patriots set out from this Island toward history’s most important battle,” President Trump said. “They stormed forward out of ships and airplanes, risking everything to defend our people and to ensure that the United States and Britain would forever remain sovereign and forever remain free.”

[The American-British alliance is thriving under President Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99a926315b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
|

clean_body: Courtesy of Queen Elizabeth II, the first day of President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump’s first official State Visit... | | | | | The White House • June 4, 2019 | | | Video of the Day: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump in the U.K. | | Thanks to the eminent hospitality of Queen Elizabeth II, the first day of President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump’s official State Visit to the United Kingdom embodied the full elegance of a royal celebration. Yesterday’s full schedule concluded where it began: historic Buckingham Palace, where President Trump and the Queen raised their glasses to the lasting friendship between our two nations. “Your Majesty, Melania and I are profoundly honored to be your guests for this historic State Visit,” the President said. “On behalf of all Americans, I offer a toast to the eternal friendship of our people, the vitality of our nations, and to the long-cherished and truly remarkable reign of her Majesty, the Queen.” | | Why the U.S.–U.K. alliance is stronger than ever Early this morning by U.S. time, President Trump and British Prime Minister Theresa May marked day two of the President's State Visit to the U.K. with a joint press conference at 10 Downing Street in London. 🎬President Trump: As President Trump stated it, the longstanding American-British alliance is the greatest the world has ever known. “Our relationship is grounded in common history, values, customs, culture, language and laws,” he said today. “Our people believe in freedom and independence as a sacred birthright and cherished inheritance worth defending at any cost.” On the world stage, the United Kingdom remains a key partner in advancing shared global interests. Just one example of that alliance in action: the joint campaign to defeat ISIS. With the U.K.’s help, ISIS’ territorial caliphate in Syria and Iraq has now been completely obliterated. This week also marks the 75th anniversary of D-Day. On June 6, 1944, American and British soldiers fought side-by-side to liberate Europe from brutal Nazi occupation and make the world safe for freedom and democracy. It was this shared sacrifice that sealed profound, enduring bonds between America and Britain. “Seventy-five years ago this Thursday, courageous Americans and British patriots set out from this Island toward history’s most important battle,” President Trump said. “They stormed forward out of ships and airplanes, risking everything to defend our people and to ensure that the United States and Britain would forever remain sovereign and forever remain free.” . | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead | President Trump participates in a joint press conference with British Prime Minister Theresa May at No. 10 Downing Street in London | June 4, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: Support my plan to defend and create American jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
In my administration, we'll stop making excuses. We'll pursue aggressive new government policies to support American workers. Add your name if you're on board: | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e6b1/45c30650/942851b0/66980b8a/2621714289/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Let's face it: Giant companies that like to call themselves "American" only have one real loyalty -- to their shareholders.

They'll ship jobs overseas and hollow out our cities if it'll save them a nickel.

And for too long, Washington politicians have let them call the shots of our trade agreements and our tax code.

But not on my watch. **In my administration, government policy will support American workers. I call it economic patriotism.

We'll start with a new federal agency with one mission: Defend and create American jobs.

[It's time to make fundamental, structural changes in how government treats the economy. When I'm president, that's exactly what we'll do. Add your name to say you're a part of this fight.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e6b1/45c30650/942851b0/66980b8d/2621714289/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYwNGVtMi12MXMzIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-economic-patriotism?source=20190604em2-v1s3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

We'll put American workers and middle-class prosperity ahead of multinational profits and Wall Street bonuses.

And we'll reject the excuses we've heard for decades about why we can't do more to help workers.

The truth is that Washington policies -- not unstoppable market forces -- are a key driver of the problems American workers face.

**From our trade agreements to our tax code, we 've encouraged companies to invest abroad, ship jobs overseas, and keep wages low.** All in the interest of serving multinational companies and international capital with no particular loyalty to the United States.

**In my administration, we 'll stop making excuses. We'll pursue aggressive new government policies to support American workers.**

Our new Department of Economic Development will replace the Commerce Department and a handful of other federal agencies.

Right now, government programs that affect job creation are an afterthought, uncoordinated and scattered across the government, and submerged in larger agencies with different primary missions.

Let's pull them together and use aggressive new tools -- that other countries have used successfully -- to fight for American workers.

Critically, all of our trade-related programs will fall within the new Department. That way, we'll make clear that trade policy must defend and create American jobs.

This is not a question of more or less government: It's about who the government works for.

In the weeks ahead, I'll release more plans on how this vision of economic patriotism should shape our economy, from trade policy to Wall Street -- and I'll keep you posted.

**[Add your name if you're on board: We need to make American workers our highest priority, rather than continuing to cater to the interests of companies and people with no allegiance to America.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e6b1/45c30650/942851b0/66980b8d/2621714289/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDYwNGVtMi12MXMzIn0=/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-economic-patriotism?source=20190604em2-v1s3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Can you take our short #NoMiddleGround survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
Need to hear from you on this. We’ll get the results to Bernie.

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)
**Take our short survey. Tell us the issues that you believe there can be “no middle ground” on. We’ll get the results to Bernie.
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_middle_ground_issues_survey/?source=em190604-2-45&refcode2=1579.150750.yvVP3a&t=2&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)
**

* * *
Friends -
Last weekend, Bernie gave a rousing speech at the California Democratic Party convention.
He talked about the fact that there can be no “middle ground” on issues like climate change, health care, and putting a stop to our endless wars.
We’ve included a large part of the speech below. But today, what we want to know is this: what are the issues you care about that there can be no middle ground on?
[**Take a very short issue survey – tell Bernie what issues you believe there can be no middle ground on. We’ll make sure he gets the results.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_middle_ground_issues_survey/?source=em190604-2-45&refcode2=1579.150750.yvVP3a&t=3&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_middle_ground_issues_survey/?source=em190604-2-45&refcode2=1579.150750.yvVP3a&t=4&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)
Here’s the part of the speech that went viral:
> _"We have got to make it clear that when the future of the planet is at stake, there is no “middle ground.” We will take on the fossil fuel industry and transform our energy system.
>
> We have got to make it clear that when this country drifts toward oligarchy, there is no “middle ground.” Large profitable corporations like Amazon will pay their fair share of taxes.
>
> When it comes to health care, there is no “middle ground.” Health care is a human right, not a privilege and we will guarantee health care to all of our people through a Medicare for All single-payer system.
>
> When it comes to abortion, there is no “middle ground.” A woman has the right to control her own life, not the government.
>
> When it comes to prescription drugs, no “middle ground.” We are going to take on the pharmaceutical industry and cut prescription drug prices in half.
>
> And when it comes to mass shootings and the fact that 40,000 people were killed last year with guns, no “middle ground.” We will take on the NRA.
>
> And when it comes to criminal justice reform and immigration reform, no “middle ground.” We will take on the prison-industrial complex. We will take on racism at the border.
>
> And when it comes to foreign policy, no “middle ground.” We will finally put an end to a bloated military budget and end endless wars."_
Take the short survey. Tell us the issues that you believe there can be no middle ground on:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/no_middle_ground**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_middle_ground_issues_survey/?source=em190604-2-45&refcode2=1579.150750.yvVP3a&t=5&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)
This is important. We’ll make sure Bernie gets the results. So thank you for sounding off.
All our best,
Team Bernie
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_middle_ground_issues_survey/?source=em190604-2-45&refcode2=1579.150750.yvVP3a&t=6&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1579_150750_yvVP3a&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=10&akid=1579%2E150750%2EyvVP3a).
